mapper.sql: v.oom_id, v.vrfcn_inst_id, i.vrfcn_inst_nm, v.eval_grd_cd, v.eval_rmrk, v.use_bgng_dt, v.use_end_dt, v.frst_reg_dt, v.frst_reg_user_id, v.last_chg_dt, v.last_chg_user_id
FROM er.tn_oom_check_vrfr_eval v JOIN com.tn_vrfcn_inst i ON i.vrfcn_inst_id = v.vrfcn_inst_id AND NOW() BETWEEN i.use_bgng_dt AND i.use_end_dt WHERE NOW() BETWEEN v.use_bgng_dt AND v.use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_oom_check_vrfr_eval (oom_id, vrfcn_inst_id, eval_grd_cd, eval_rmrk, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{oomId}, #{vrfcnInstId}, #{evalGrdCd}, #{evalRmrk}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
